## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Chore / tooling / refactor (`chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test` and, if frontend touched, `npm run test`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` and `npm run lint`)
- [ ] Format clean (`cargo fmt --all --check`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
